title: notodanthonia acerosa
intro: Notodanthonia acerosa, also known as the hairy needle tussock-grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in New Zealand, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Notodanthonia acerosa can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat skin irritations and promote skin health.
